app.title: TodoApp
app.emptyHint: Capture the one thing that matters most right now.
app.emptySearchSub: Try a different search term or clear the filter.
app.sortSmartHint: Sorted by priority & deadline. Click to switch to drag-and-drop
app.sortManualHint: Manual drag-and-drop order. Click to switch back to smart sort

settings.title: Settings
settings.backupDescription: Backup all data to your WebDAV cloud storage
settings.aboutTagline: A quiet, focused todo companion that keeps your attention where it belongs — on what matters.
settings.aboutBody: TodoApp brings quick tasks and long-term goals into one calm, focused space. Deadline reminders keep you on track, the built-in focus timer helps you enter a flow state, and one-click exports to JSON, CSV, or a polished PDF report let you share or archive your progress anytime. Everything is stored locally on your device, isolated per account — private, yours, always.
settings.aboutHighlightsBody: A distraction-free interface keeps you focused on tasks, not tooling. Light and dark themes plus full bilingual support (Chinese / English) adapt to any context. A global hotkey summons the app instantly without breaking your focus. Focus timer, deadline alerts, data backup, and multi-format export — one app, complete workflow.
settings.aboutCompareBody: Unlike mainstream todo apps that require accounts, cloud sync, and monthly subscriptions, TodoApp is local-first: no sign-up, no recurring fees, no data leaving your device. The quick/long-term task split plus deadline reminders reduce missed items that flat lists often lose. A built-in focus timer means you no longer juggle a separate Pomodoro app. If you want a reliable, calm task manager that stays out of your way, TodoApp was built for exactly that.
settings.importHint: Supports JSON backup files. This will replace all current todos.

ai.enableDesc: Unlocks Asha assistant & smart breakdown. Keys stay on this device
ai.privacyNote: Privacy: your API keys and conversations never leave this device except going directly to the provider you choose. Reachable domains are strictly allow-listed.

aiPermissions.title: Model Permissions
aiPermissions.settingsLocked: Settings are always locked for security
aiPermissions.tierSuggestDesc: Read + propose writes, all writes require confirmation

chat.greeting: Hi, I'm Asha 🐾 — a little snow leopard living inside TodoApp. Ask me anything about the app, or switch to cowork mode and I'll help organize your tasks.
chat.modeChatHint: Conversation only — never reads or touches your tasks
chat.modeCoworkHint: Cowork: Asha can manage todos, habits, notes, music library, tags, recurrence, and navigate tools. Writes need your approval
chat.placeholder: Talk to Asha… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)
chat.placeholderCowork: Ask Asha to organize your tasks… (writes need approval)
chat.confirmTitle: Asha wants to perform these actions. Allow?
chat.noProvider: No model configured. Go to Settings → AI Lab and add any provider's API key.

breakdown.title: AI Breakdown
breakdown.noKey: No model configured yet. Add any provider's API key in AI Lab to use this.
